mapper.select: SELECT MENU_CD AS menuCd, JOB_GRADE AS jobGrade, ALLOWED AS allowed FROM MENU_PERMISSION
mapper.insert: MERGE INTO MENU_PERMISSION dst USING (SELECT #{menuCd} AS MENU_CD, #{jobGrade} AS JOB_GRADE FROM DUAL) src ON (dst.MENU_CD = src.MENU_CD AND dst.JOB_GRADE = src.JOB_GRADE) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET ALLOWED = #{allowed}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (MENU_CD, JOB_GRADE, ALLOWED, UPDATED_AT) VALUES (#{menuCd}, #{jobGrade}, #{allowed}, SYSDATE)
